headline: Citi Cuts Medtronic (MDT) Target, Stifel Lowers Outlook after MiniMed IPO
summary: Medtronic plc (NYSE:MDT) is included among the 15 Best Cheap Dividend Stocks to Buy. On April 7, Citi analyst Joanne Wuensch lowered the firm’s price target on Medtronic plc (NYSE:MDT) to $110 from $117 and kept a Buy rating. The update came as part of a Q1 preview for the medical technology group. The analyst […]
